name: Aetheron
description: Aetheron (AETH) is the fixed-supply utility token for the Aetheron platform on Base. AETH supports the platform's presale and planned DeFi ecosystem. Verify every interaction against the official Base contract address.

logo.requirements: Square PNG, transparent background preferred, at least 200x200 pixels

ownership.note: BaseScan token-profile updates require the owner to sign in, verify address ownership, and submit the profile form. Never store a private key in this file or GitHub Actions.

reviewBeforeSubmission: Confirm https://aetrs.com/logo.png is the final square token logo
Add only social accounts that are already live and controlled by Aetheron
Confirm all claims remain accurate at submission time
Complete BaseScan address-ownership verification with the owner wallet
